Company: The name of the company the data pertains to.
Year: The year in which the gender composition data was evaluated.
Department: The specific team or department within the company the data pertains to.
Percentage_Women: The percentage of women in the specific team or department for that year.
Percentage_Men: The percentage of men in the specific team or department for that year.
Percentage_NonBinary: The percentage of non-binary employees in the specific team or department for that year.
Quarterly_Variation: An assessment of how the gender composition changed over the quarters of the year.
